title: Tales from Deep Hell
overview: Episodes based on bloody stories between demons, killers, eroticism and violence: the morbid voyeurism of a peep show spectator who is no longer satisfied by simple nudity, a woman who will do anything to regain her beauty, a very particular chess game and much more.
